WorldObjectDef.Name: Milira_GeneratedAsteroid_SolarCrystal
WorldObjectDef.label: basic asteroid
WorldObjectDef.description: A vacstone asteroid that was towed into orbit around the planet as part of a mining operation long ago. Some of the rocks have turned into Solar Crystals under the influence of strong electromagnetic radiation. Most of the valuable resources have been depleted from this asteroid.\n\nThis location can be reached using transport pods, shuttles, or a gravship.

WorldObjectDef.label: asteroid mining site
WorldObjectDef.description: A vacstone asteroid that was towed into orbit around the planet as part of a mining operation long ago. Some of the rocks have turned into Solar Crystals under the influence of strong electromagnetic radiation. This asteroid has only been partially mined.\n\nThis location can be reached using transport pods, shuttles, or a gravship.
